name: NFL Football Fanatic
overview: Each week Australian transplant Darren McMullen visits a different American city to learn about the unique take they have on football fandom, with real “super-fans” as his guides. He'll explore all aspects of NFL traditions and experiences, with behind-the scenes access to players, coaches, and other iconic football figures during team practices and pre-game warmups.

trailers.title: NFL Football Fanatic | Premieres This January | USA Network
